workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_tiqora/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
YOU MUST ALWAYS SPEAK OUTPUT in the configured communication_language resolved from merged tiqora config.
Generate artifacts in document_language resolved from merged tiqora config, unless user explicitly asks otherwise.
Execute ALL steps in exact order; do NOT skip steps.
Do not report "completed" until all implementation and validation activities are truly finished.

step.action: Load project config from {project_config} as required input.
HALT: "✗ No project .tiqora.yaml found. Run npx tiqora init in the project root."
Load profile config from {profile_config} when available (optional).
Build effective config as: profile config (base) + project config (override).

Apply defaults when missing: user_name={default_user_name}, idle_threshold_minutes={default_idle_threshold_minutes}, communication_language={default_communication_language}, document_language={default_document_language}.
Validate required project keys: pm_tool, git_host, branch_pattern.

action.if: any required project key is missing

step.action: HALT: "✗ Blocking configuration error in {project_config}: missing required keys pm_tool, git_host, and/or branch_pattern."
step.output: [WORKFLOW] dev-story config loaded — project + profile merged

step.action: Read {active_run_file} if present.

check.if: an active run exists and is not completed
check.ask: Do you want to resume this run or close it before starting another one? (resume/close)

check.action: Mark previous run closed, then continue.

step.action: If a ticket ID is provided, retrieve the ticket via configured PM MCP connector before challenge/implementation.
If pm_tool is configured and no ticket provided, ask user to choose: existing ticket or create ticket.

check.ask: Ticket retrieval failed. Retry MCP fetch or continue in standalone short-description mode? (retry/standalone)

check.action: Retry retrieval once and continue if successful.
Continue with explicit ambiguity warning and queue sync retry metadata in .tiqora sync area.

step.critical: No implementation starts before challenge is passed.
step.action: Capture current active persona as {{entry_persona}}.
Load PM persona from {project-root}/_tiqora/agents/pm.md for the challenge gate.
Run a PM-quality challenge on the current ticket before implementation with checks for: clarity, logical consistency, implementation completeness, dependency coverage, and acceptance testability.
Create challenge artifact at {workflow_steps_dir}/{{runId}}-challenge.md with: intent, AC checklist, PM challenge verdict, feasibility notes, risks/blockers, and high-level approach.

check.if: PM challenge finds ticket quality gaps
check.action: Restore persona to {{entry_persona}} before waiting for user clarifications.
check.ask: PM challenge found ticket gaps. Clarify or update the ticket before implementation proceeds.

check.if: ticket or acceptance criteria are ambiguous
check.action: Restore persona to {{entry_persona}} before waiting for user clarifications.
check.ask: Provide clarifications to remove ambiguity before implementation proceeds.

check.action: Restore persona to {{entry_persona}} before step 5+ implementation work.

step.goal: Create/switch branch and persist run state
step.action: Resolve branch name from ticket ID + slug using branch_pattern from effective config.
Create or switch to target branch.
Ensure directories exist: {workflow_runs_dir} and {workflow_steps_dir}.
Persist active run state atomically to {active_run_file} and run artifact in {workflow_runs_dir}.

step.critical: Follow the approved challenge scope; do not implement out-of-scope features.
step.action: Load Developer persona from {project-root}/_tiqora/agents/dev.md for implementation and test execution.
Plan concrete implementation tasks from challenge + ticket context.
Write failing tests first when feasible (red), implement minimal code (green), then refactor safely (refactor).
Run targeted and regression tests.
Update run artifacts and notes under .tiqora as work progresses.

action.if: required dependency or architectural change exceeds scope

step.action: ASK user approval before proceeding.
Load and execute validation checklist from {validation}.
If checklist fails, return to implementation/validation until pass or HALT with explicit blockers.
Restore persona to {{entry_persona}} before final workflow status communication.

check.if: work is complete and validation passed
check.action: Mark run state as completed and persist atomically.
Mark run state as awaiting_user and persist atomically.
Keep run state as in_progress and persist atomically.
check.output: [WORKFLOW] dev-story in_progress — next implementation step queued
